MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar/fee paid. Proceedings reported by: Patrick Heard, CSR#11055 (212)

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2006 Continued To Jan-04-07 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is heard this day. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $100.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 1/4/2007 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Janet Pond, CSR#5292. (212) Written sanction order not issued. Court received this afternoon letter from counsel informing the court of payment of fee to the ESP program. (212)

Notice Of Otion And Otion For Order To Compel Document Production And For An Award Of Attorney'S Fees And Sanctions;
Off Calendar Nov-09-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Plaintiff Bradshaw & Associates' Motion to Compel Document Production is Granted in part and denied in part. Numbers 6, 10, 13, 15, 16, 17 and 18 are denied as overly broad and irrelevant. Numbers 11, and 12 are denied as they are irrelevant, except as they relate to financial worth.
The motion is granted as to number 14, limited to the furniture delivered to Defendant. Late opposition has been considered.
The motion is granted as to Number 14, limited to the furniture delivered to Defendant.
Late opposition has been considered.
Further responses shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order.
All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2006 Set For Trial On Jan-29-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jan-09-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 606

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
